S.FORM: Tiribi na Kacalisian(原住民族電視台, Taiwan Indigenous Television) avan tiribi i taiwan. == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: tiribi na kaʦaɭisian(*******, taiwan indigənuus təɭəvisiun) avan tiribi i taiwan. == kaizuan ==
